narrative.headline: What 2016 Volkswagen Passat owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 106 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Air Bags (24% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.

issues.sample: TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2016 VOLKSWAGEN PASSAT. WHILE DRIVING APPROXIMATELY 20 MPH AND ATTEMPTING TO MAKE A LEFT TURN, ANOTHER VEHICLE CRASHED INTO THE FRONT PASSENGER SIDE OF THE CONTACT'S VEHICLE. THE AIR BAGS FAILED TO DEPLOY. THE PASSENGER IN THE REAR PASSENGER SEAT SUSTAINED
